skill_availability_goal: Verify that qa-agent consumes same-path PRD/TRD but blocks E2E acceptance work when the confirmed implementation plan is missing.
prompt: 用户说：account/profile/preferences 已经开发完成，请基于 docs/pm/account/profile/preferences/PRD.md 和 docs/engineer/account/profile/preferences/TRD.md 更新并执行 E2E 验收 TC。docs/qa/e2e/account/profile/preferences/ 目录也存在。先做 QA 路由和门禁判断。
